subcodes.first_line: The honored Afnán—upon him be the peace of the Merciful—hath repeatedly attained Our presence. Praised be God that he is mentioned by this Wronged One
subcodes.first_line_orig: جناب افنان علیه سلام الرحمن مکرر بحضور فائز لله الحمد نزد مظلوم مذکورند و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @martyrs and martyrdom, @predictions and prophecies, @Hands of the Cause, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @rejection, opposition and persecution
